{"id":"project-LICHEN-p2y5.6","title":"Gateway: End-to-end border router test","description":"## Goal

Validate that a mesh node can reach the internet via gateway.

## Test setup

```
[Internet host]
      │
   [Router]  ← Provides IPv6 prefix
      │
  [Gateway]  ← LICHEN border router
      │
    LoRa
      │
 [Mesh node]
```

## Test cases

### 1. Mesh node pings internet
- Mesh node: ping6 2001:4860:4860::8888 (Google DNS)
- Verify: ICMP echo reply received
- Validates: outbound forwarding works

### 2. Internet host pings mesh node
- Internet host: ping6 <mesh-node-gua>
- Verify: ICMP echo reply received
- Validates: inbound forwarding + routing works

### 3. Mesh node fetches HTTP
- Mesh node: CoAP proxy request to http://example.com
- Or: direct TCP if stack supports
- Validates: TCP forwarding works

### 4. Prefix delegation
- Restart gateway
- Verify: mesh node gets new address from delegated prefix
- Validates: DHCPv6-PD integration

### 5. Gateway failover (if multi-gateway)
- Kill primary gateway
- Verify: mesh node switches to secondary
- Validates: multi-gateway works

## Test environments

### Simulation
- Python simulator with mock backhaul
- Verify forwarding logic

### Renode
- Simulated gateway + mesh node
- Mock network for backhaul

### Hardware
- Real gateway (Heltec V3 or RPi)
- Real mesh node
- Real internet connectivity","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T20:37:32.180218Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T20:37:32.180218Z","labels":["testing","gateway","core","networking"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-p2y5.6","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-p2y5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T20:37:32.339347Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-p2y5.6","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-p2y5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-16T20:37:32.467597Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-p2y5.6","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-p2y5.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-16T20:37:32.626492Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-p2y5.6","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-p2y5.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-16T20:37:32.751977Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
